title: EasyElytra
description: Obtain it by crafting elytra or trading with villagers
body:
Do you want to use Elitra at the beginning of the game and are not strong enough to go to the End? THIS mod allows you to craft Elitra without going to End City. Don't you want to craft, then trade with the villagers (ARMORER)



**_There may not be a fashion update because there is nothing to add._**
